title: stipellula tigrensis
intro: Stipellula tigrensis is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the tiger bush. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipellula tigrensis include the potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the roots to create a decoction, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
